description: Desync recovery test case - node with time offset from DODAG root epoch. Independent oracle computed from ccp15.json low-density SF10 case adjusted for 1-slot desync (hash_32 delta). Matches select_channel pseudocode in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md
notes: format_version=2 bare array root (per schema oneOf array branch for ccp16-desync.json). Compare to ccp15.json and ccp16.json for consistency in v2 migration. Tests desync tolerance in TDMA/CCP-16.
